<Meta title="Templates/Overview" />

# Templates

**Status: not yet built.** This section is reserved for Phase 4 — page-level layouts composed
from [Patterns](?path=/docs/patterns-overview--docs), which are complete (34 patterns across
Editorial, Navigation, and Content Discovery). Templates define structure only and remain
content-agnostic, per the project brief.

## Planned

Homepage, Article, Live Blog, Opinion, Features, Category Landing, Author Profile, Search
Results, Newsletter Landing, Video, Podcast, Archive, Error Pages.

## Dependency chain

```
Design Tokens → Foundations → Components → Patterns → Templates
```

Templates are the last layer and depend on everything above being in place — in particular
the page-level grid conventions described in
[Grid & Layout](?path=/docs/foundations-grid-layout--docs), which are documented but not yet
implemented as reusable layout components.
